content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with all sectors green, IT +1.99%, Pharma +2.76%, Realty +2.61%, Metal +1.96% leading. VIX down 6% to 18.53 indicates risk-on. Power sector continuing its run on heatwave demand theme. Book is 60% deployed with positive unrealized P&L; focus on trailing SLs to protect gains rather than chasing extended moves.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held 0 days, -2.4% but stock is sector leader today (+2.08%), strong Q4 (+35% PAT), bullish research view. SL at 76.50 (~3.8% below CMP) gives breathing room. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.14,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +7% with strong Q4 (GNPA <1%, PAT +18%). Current SL 1032.14 is already locking in ~+4.9% gain — good. No-op MODIFY would be wasteful. Keeping SL/target unchanged via HOLD instead.",
      "max_hold_days": 7
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5%, defensive hedge position. Akshaya Tritiya seasonal demand and continued central bank gold buying support thesis. SL at 119 gives 4.5% room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Already at SL=1418 which is above entry 1412.94 — already at breakeven+. No-op, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "-1.4%, results due Apr 30 (3 days). SL at 2295 (~1.9% below CMP) tight. Binary event risk acknowledged but supplementary research suggests sector rotation back into FMCG. Hold into results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 407.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.5%, currently near 52-week high. Power demand theme strong (256 GW peak record on Apr 26). SL currently 405 (just above entry). Tightening SL to 407 to lock in modest gain while letting heatwave demand theme play."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, intraday reversed from high 1824 to 1782. Stock extended (+39% in April) and intraday weakness post breakout is concerning. SL at 1760 (~1.3% below CMP) is tight enough — let it work or stop out cleanly. No need to add risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +0.2% but had a strong run (+7.5% on Organon catalyst) intraday. Pharma sector leading +2.76%. Tightening SL from 1705 to 1715 to lock in small gain while letting the acquisition narrative play out. Target 1830 maintained."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, near 52-week high. Tightening SL from 316 to 318 (just below entry of 320.50, essentially breakeven minus thin buffer) to manage risk on transmission monopoly play. Heatwave demand theme intact."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },

    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, marginal P&L."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",

      "reasoning": "SL already above entry — locked in gain. Strong Q4 print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Holding into Apr 30 results; SL at 2295 manages downside."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 407.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL to 407 to lock in small gain while riding heatwave demand theme."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL at 1760 already in place; intraday weakness suggests stop may trigger if breakdown continues — acceptable risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL after Organon catalyst pop to lock in small gain; pharma sector leadership supports holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,

  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK (+5.58%) — ignored despite recovery; SFIO/SEBI overhang and shrinking advances disqualify. M&MFIN strong Q4 catalyst but already up 8.9% — wait for pullback to 305-310 zone. HINDZINC, TATAPOWER, PHARMABEES — already have working LIMIT BUYs in OPEN orders, no stacking. ANANTRAJ ED raid — avoid. JSWENERGY/SAIL/VEDL — book already has heavy Power+Metals correlated cluster exposure (NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER, HINDZINC pending); no new adds in cluster.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with 9 holdings + 3 pending BUY LIMIT orders (PHARMABEES @23.65, HINDZINC @612, TATAPOWER @443). PHARMABEES @23.65 limit looks misplaced vs likely market price for the ETF — flagging but not cancelling without confirmation. HINDZINC @612 (CMP 627) and TATAPOWER @443 (CMP 453) — both BELOW current market, so they will only fill on a dip; reasonable to leave as patient bids since chasing extended breakouts has poor R:R. NO new entries this tick — deployment hysteresis applies (>60% deployed, multiple pending orders, correlated power/metals cluster forming). Focus is on trailing SLs to protect gains. Day P&L +0.36%, capital preservation prioritized."
}
